generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just puts our families at risk. Strong alliances mean strong security - let's not gamble with our safety. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
